item.title: Anatomy Of A Modern Merger: A Step-By-Step Guide For GCs
item.description: This road map will take you from due diligence to company integration.

item.title: Generate Biomedicines’ IPO Brings In $400M for Pivotal Tests of Severe Asthma Drug
item.description: Flagship Pioneering-founded Generate Biomedicines aims to offer less frequent injections compared to a blockbuster asthma drug from partners Amgen and...

item.title: EU Eases Corporate Sustainability Rules
item.description: The decision was made to help relieve companies of administrative burden and reduce costs.

item.title: Atrium Therapeutics Launches With $270M for RNA Therapies Addressing Rare Cardio Conditions
item.description: Atrium spun out of Avidity Biosciences, which Novartis acquired in a $12 billion deal.

item.title: AI Giant Anthropic Says It ‘Cannot in Good Conscience’ Agree to Pentagon Demands
item.description: The Pentagon has threatened to deem the AI firm a supply chain risk, something CEO Dario Amodei says is contradictory.
